Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Traqde Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $940. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion & Motion To Appoint Receiver And Enforce Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to appoint a receiver and enforce judgment is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motrion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery ; And For Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

David Davari, Managing Director for Defendant Focaccia Cafe, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION: Plaintiff Creditors Trade's motion for post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. The request for monetary sanctions is denied.
MODIFICATION: TO SET COMPLIANCE DATE OF NOVEMBER 14, 2006. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Atty'S Fees

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for post judgment attorneys fees is granted in the amount of $1950. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
